mapper.insert:
insert into tbl_message (create_time, create_id, update_time, update_id, deleted, organization_id, user_id, message_title, message_content, jump_url, read_flag, message_group, message_source) values
(#{item.createTime}, #{item.createId}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.updateId}, #{item.deleted}, #{item.organizationId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.messageTitle}, #{item.messageContent}, #{item.jumpUrl}, #{item.readFlag}, #{item.messageGroup}, #{item.messageSource})
